task:

for now, let's discuss how we can design this skill specifically for local.drizzle.studio utilising agent-browser.

it obviously doesnt need ALL the commands from agent-browser.

just very specific ones. you can git clone this repo if needed to see how to strcuture.

secondly we also have localhost:8288 which is inngest instance.

we also want to have lightfast-inngest similarly structured.
